_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the hidden-rows-in-target (branch 6) of the excel-activities/append-range-failures playbook. Agent must chain: folders → jobs list faulted → jobs get (BusinessException flagging hidden rows in the append region under package v2.8.5+) → jobs logs (AutoFilter active on column 'Status' hiding rows 4012-4089; the computed append target starts at row 4101 and the validator's lookback intersects the hidden region (rows 4012-4089)) → workflow source. The active AutoFilter + the v2.8.5+ package version are the smoking gun.

rules.match: or jobs list --folder-key f00aaaaa-3333-4444-5555-666677778888 --state Faulted --output json
